get.summary: Retrieve a monitor for a business

post.summary: Create a monitor for a business

put.summary: Update a monitor for a business

delete.summary: Delete a monitor for a business

post.description: Disables monitors for all businesses in the account. This operation is processed asynchronously. When monitor_types is omitted, all monitor types allowed for the account are disabled.

monitor_types.description: Array of monitor types to disable. Defaults to all types allowed for the account.

notification_email.description: Email address to notify when bulk disable operation completes

post.summary: Create a lien for a business

state.description: State where the lien will be filed

secured_parties.description: Array of secured party details (optional - uses account defaults if not provided)

secured_party.description: Single secured party (alternative to secured_parties array)

collateral.description: Collateral description (optional - uses account default if not provided)

packet_number.description: Packet number for the filing (optional - auto-generated if not provided)

post.summary: Create a termination for a lien
post.description: Creates a lien termination or returns existing one if already terminated

422.description: lien in created status cannot be terminated

packet_number.description: Packet number for the termination filing (optional - auto-generated if not provided)

get.summary: List policy results for a business
get.description: Returns policy results for enabled policy versions only

200.description: multiple policy results with different versions

get.description: Returns the availability status of the IRS TIN matching service

get.summary: Retrieve website analysis for a business
get.description: Returns website analysis data including domain info, pages, and quality indicators

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include additional data. Use "indicator_details" to include source examples and explanations for each indicator

get.description: Returns a paginated list of timeline events for a business. Timeline events include Secretary of State (SOS) history events and SOS monitoring events, providing a chronological record of changes to the business's registration data.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of events per page (default: 100, max: 100)

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter events on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter events on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

parameters.name: event_types
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of event types to filter by

tax_registration_types.description: Types of tax registrations (e.g., sales_tax, payroll_tax)

get.summary: Fetch guest dashboard link for a registration request

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: US state abbreviation (e.g., CO, CA, NY)

parameters.name: include_eit_lst
parameters.description: Include EIT and LST jurisdictions (PA only)

get.description: Returns a list of available agents for running workflows
Retrieves details of a specific agent
Returns a paginated list of agent threads

post.description: Creates a new agent thread for running agent workflows

201.description: agent thread created with context_type and context_id

type.description: The agent type to use for this agent thread

business_id.description: Business to use as context for the thread. Shorthand for context_type=business. Required unless context_type and context_id are provided.

context_id.description: The ID of the context resource. Must be provided with context_type.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific agent thread
Returns a paginated list of agent runs

201.description: agent run created within existing agent thread

400.description: missing context when thread_id is not provided

type.description: The agent type to use for this agent run

business_id.description: Business to use as context for the run. Shorthand for context_type=business. Required when thread_id is not provided (unless context_type and context_id are given).

context_id.description: The ID of the context resource. Must be provided with context_type.

thread_id.description: Optional agent thread ID in which to execute the agent run

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific agent run
